questions.question: What is the primary focus of the S. Ramakrishnan Centre of Excellence in Fluid and Thermal Science Research 2025?
questions.option_4: Critical advancements in spacecraft and launch vehicle thermal management

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the semi-cryogenic engine of ISRO in 2025?

questions.option_3: To power the semi-cryogenic booster stage of the Launch Vehicle Mark-3 (LVM3)
questions.option_4: To power the Geosynchronous Satellite Launch Vehicle (GSLV)

questions.question: Where did ISRO conduct the hot test of the semi-cryogenic engine in 2025?

questions.option_3: Liquid Propulsion Systems Centre, Mahendragiri, Tamil Nadu
questions.option_4: ISRO Propulsion Complex, Mahendragiri, Tamil Nadu
